prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild hall, medium shot. Mira Ledgerfall, an androgynous cadre in a navy cloak with gold trim, holds a heavy leather-bound ledger open. Mira points to an entry on the parchment with a confident expression, looking toward Ari Starling, a healer in cream and mint robes. Ari leans in slightly to inspect the ledger, her hands near her satchel. Bright, polished anime aesthetic, bustling guild background, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous Japanese fantasy guild shot. Ari Starling nods in understanding, reaching into her satchel to retrieve a small glowing healing vial. She presents the vial to Mira, who accepts it with her free hand while holding the ledger. They share a professional, cooperative moment of resource allocation. Consistent character appearance, lighting, and camera angle, no text, no watermark.
